localP1: Kings Mountain was founded in 1872 when the Charlotte-Atlanta Railway came through, and W.A. Mauney opened the first store, mill, and bank. The town sits in the heart of Cleveland County, about 35 minutes west of Charlotte, near the site of the 1780 Battle of Kings Mountain, a turning point in the American Revolution. Today it is a working town where manufacturing, retail, and professional services keep the economy moving.
localP2: We build for the people who run this town: the manufacturer and the machine shop, the restaurant on Main Street, the retailer drawing customers from across the county and the Charlotte commute shed. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
